description_long: This object is a classic assault rifle with a distinctive combination of black metal and reddish-brown wooden components. The stock and handguard are made of polished wood, while the receiver, barrel, and magazine are constructed from matte black metal. The rifle features a curved detachable magazine, a prominent front sight post, and a rear sight mounted on the receiver cover. The barrel is long and slender, ending in a simple muzzle device. The overall design is robust and utilitarian, with visible screws and mechanical details typical of military rifles.
description: A black metal assault rifle with reddish-brown wooden stock and handguard, featuring a curved magazine and iron sights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile, including the wooden stock, handguard, curved magazine, and iron sights.
description_view_1: Front-on view highlighting the narrow barrel, front sight post, and the alignment of the wooden handguard.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the wooden stock, handguard, and the magazine from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear-on view showing the end of the stock and the alignment of the barrel and receiver.
